name: Banana Cake with Chocolate Whipped Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour two 8-inch square or two 9-inch round baking pans.
3. Cream shortening and sugar together in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in mashed bananas and vanilla.
6. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
7. Stir in chopped pecans.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and cool on wire racks.
11. Place the bottom layer of cake on a serving plate.
12. Spread with half of the Chocolate Whipped Cream.
13. Slice bananas, dip them in lemon juice, and arrange around the edge of the bottom layer.
14. Cover with the top layer of cake.
15. Spread remaining Chocolate Whipped Cream over the top.
16. Garnish with remaining banana slices and chopped pecans.
17. Keep refrigerated until serving time.
Chocolate Whipped Cream:
- 1 cup semisweet or milk chocolate morsels
- 1 cup (8 ounces) whipping cream
1. Melt chocolate morsels in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a chilled mixing bowl, whip the cream with an electric mixer on high speed until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold in the cooled chocolate into the whipped cream until well blended.
